LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUL-17-2020 HEARING RE: PETITIONER UMPQUA BANK AMENDED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND TO ENTER JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. EXHIBITS 1-9 TO REPLY DECLARATION OF ROBERT B. KAPLAN IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS AFTER GRANTING OF AMENDED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND TO ENTER JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100112998) FILED BY PETITIONER UMPQUA BANK

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER UMPQUA BANK'S MOTION FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS AFTER GRANTING OF AMENDED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND TO ENTER JUDGMENT IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $53,354.48 IN FEES AND $2,638.90 IN COSTS. RESPONDENT XELAN PROP 1, LLC'S BELATED OPPOSITION INCORRECTLY STATES THAT PETITIONER'S MOTION SEEKS "$200,000," AND OTHERWISE DOES NOT ADDRESS THE MOTION'S SUBJECT. PETITIONER OBTAINED A JUDGMENT CONFIRMING AN ARBITRATION AWARD AGAINST RESPONDENT, WHICH WAS NOT APPEALED. (CRC 8.104(A)(1)(B).) RESPONDENT'S FEDERAL ACTION WAS DISMISSED, SO IT WAS APPROPRIATE FOR PETITIONER TO FILE FOR POST-ARBITRATION JUDGMENT AND ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS IN THIS COURT. (CCP 1292.2.) ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER, CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: 1. THE FINAL AWARD, AS THAT TERM IS DEFINED IN THE AMENDED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND TO ENTER JUDGMENT, IS CONFIRMED IN ALL RESPECTS; 2. AS THE PREVAILING PARTY, UMPQUA BANK MAY, BY NOTICED MOTION, SEEK ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS FOR BRINGING THE AMENDED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND TO ENTER JUDGMENT; AND, 3. THIS JUDGMENT CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO THE BANK'S RIGHT TO FILE A PETITION TO CONFIRM THE FINAL AWARD AS TO ANNA KIHAGI. (SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Costs After Granting Of Amended Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And To Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-09-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Kaplan, Robert B. (rbk@jmbm.com) for Petitioner.
Karen Uchiyama (karen@uchlegal.com) for Respondent.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER UMPQUA BANK's Motion For Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Costs After Granting Of Amended Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And To Enter Judgment is granted in the amount of $53,354.48 in fees and $2,638.90 in costs. Respondent Xelan Prop 1, LLC's belated opposition incorrectly states that petitioner's motion seeks "$200,000," and otherwise does not address the motion's subject. Petitioner obtained a judgment confirming an arbitration award against respondent, which was not appealed. (CRC 8.104(a)(1)(B).) Respondent's federal action was dismissed, so it was appropriate for petitioner to file for post-arbitration judgment and attorney fees and costs in this court. (CCP 1292.2.)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Costs After Granting Of Amended Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And To Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-25-2020 Continued To Oct-09-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Robert Kaplan for Plaintiff.
Karen Uchiyama for Defendant.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER UMPQUA BANK's Motion For Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Costs After Granting Of Amended Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And To Enter Judgment is continued to October 9, 2020 at 9:30am.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Amended Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And To Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-17-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER UMPQUA BANK Amended Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And To Enter Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Umpqua Bank's unopposed amended petition to confirm arbitration award and to enter judgment is granted. As the prevailing party, Umpqua Bank may, by noticed motion, seek attorney fees and costs for bringing the petition.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR#5041, email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com (302/RBU)
